mapper.select: SELECT * FROM release_assets WHERE download_token = #{downloadToken} AND published = true
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM release_assets WHERE LOWER(stored_file_name) = LOWER(#{storedFileName})
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM release_assets WHERE software_type_id = #{softwareTypeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM release_assets WHERE LOWER(middleware_name) = LOWER(#{middlewareName}) AND LOWER(version) = LOWER(#{version}) AND LOWER(original_file_name) = LOWER(#{originalFileName})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO release_assets (middleware_name, software_type_id, version, platform, description, released_at, published, download_token, original_file_name, stored_file_name, content_type, file_size, download_count, standard_document_id, standard_package, parameter_standard_id, package_status, package_error, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{middlewareName}, #{softwareTypeId}, #{version}, #{platform}, #{description}, #{releasedAt}, #{published}, #{downloadToken}, #{originalFileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{downloadCount}, #{standardDocumentId}, #{standardPackage}, #{parameterStandardId}, #{packageStatus}, #{packageError}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE release_assets SET middleware_name=#{middlewareName}, software_type_id=#{softwareTypeId}, version=#{version}, platform=#{platform}, description=#{description}, released_at=#{releasedAt}, published=#{published}, download_token=#{downloadToken}, original_file_name=#{originalFileName}, stored_file_name=#{storedFileName}, content_type=#{contentType}, file_size=#{fileSize}, standard_document_id=#{standardDocumentId}, standard_package=#{standardPackage}, parameter_standard_id=#{parameterStandardId}, package_status=#{packageStatus}, package_error=#{packageError}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM release_assets WHERE parameter_standard_id = #{parameterStandardId} AND standard_package = true
SELECT * FROM release_assets WHERE LOWER(middleware_name) = LOWER(#{middlewareName}) AND LOWER(original_file_name) = LOWER(#{originalFileName}) AND published = true LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE release_assets SET download_count = download_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
